name: AI Agent Posture
description: What's running, what it can touch, where it phones home. Identifies AI coding tools (Cursor / Claude Code / Codex / Copilot) by their launch agents + installed binaries, then reports their effective TCC scope. Helps operators answer 'which of my AI tools has read access to my source tree, and to my message archive?'

plugins.role: Identify AI tools by their launch agent labels (most modern AI dev tools install a launchd helper)
